message: Update to the latest version - transparent anatomical heart, live sim outcomes, causes and effects panels. Close all Nova windows and reopen, then click UPDATE NOW.
releaseNotes: 1.0.9 - Update popup title UPDATE NOW/Later. Transparent glass/flesh heart with visible chambers + valves + lungs path. Causes/effects cards per experiment (MI, arrhythmia, HTN, shock, arrest, HF). Live outcomes from HR/SV/TPR/volume. Physics/maths/english outcomes from computed values.
